selection_rule: Read this compact file first. Shortlist up to 3 templates from metadata and visual preview cues. Read only those preview docs. Read exactly one design doc after selection.

templates.title: Presentation Feature Core
templates.use_when: You want the strongest default video-ad system with premium product simulations, modern app surfaces, and text-light, motion-heavy pacing.
templates.avoid_when: You need a quieter or more print-led editorial aesthetic or a text-heavy keynote feel.

templates.title: Soft Editorial
templates.use_when: You want a warm editorial layer on top of the current base style, with calmer surfaces, soft paper contrast, and sparse copy.
templates.avoid_when: You need darker, more forceful commercial contrast or dense copy blocks.

templates.title: Emerald Editorial
templates.use_when: You want magazine-cover enterprise confidence with richer masthead rhythm, premium contrast, and concise copy.
templates.avoid_when: You need casual, playful, or low-formality motion, or a text-heavy layout.

templates.title: Vellum
templates.use_when: You want a dark, quiet, scholarly editorial variant with very sparse, near-textless beats.
templates.avoid_when: You need brighter pop color, louder CTA energy, or lots of on-screen copy.

templates.title: Capsule
templates.use_when: You want modular rounded cards, friendlier commercial energy, short labels, and clean multi-card UI states.
templates.avoid_when: You need austere or highly institutional formality or a paragraph-led layout.

templates.title: Cobalt Grid
templates.use_when: You want sharp design-research typography, high structure, and analytical beats with label-light motion.
templates.avoid_when: You need soft warmth, playful expressiveness, or a text-heavy narrative.
